prose:
**Frontier orbital energies of O₂** — DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier `standard`, with default RI-JK density fitting) as implemented in PySCF; gas phase; charge 0, multiplicity 3 (triplet).  Geometry: user-supplied fixed coordinates from `/Users/evane/Desktop/Research/Argonne/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz` (no re-optimization; single-point calculation).  SCF converged in 7 cycles; no engine warnings.

Results (in eV, from Koopmans energies):
• HOMO = –8.8739616 eV
• LUMO = –3.5859031 eV
→ HOMO–LUMO gap = **5.2880586 eV** (reported value).

The calculation ran via the chemkit `frontier-orbitals` skill calling PySCF; JSON output saved to `/var/folders/ym/_02kbfyd29z17l376783nlm00000gn/T/tmp573e1llt/live.json` (see CLI in result).
